Cool @CVS_Extra four day sales tags. As if we didn't waste so much paper on signage already.
"Hey this is Greg with Medicaid in Texas calling about your application for Medicaid. I need to ask a few questions to get you started!"

Ok. 

"Do you have kids you care for?"

No. 

"Alright well in Texas that's a requirement to qualify for Medicaid. Sorry." 

Umm.
so basically if i was irresponsible and had kids i would qualify for Heath care and food stamps, so ladies....
...wanna have a kid with a poverty level adult who gets no help from the movement but could with just the slight annoyance of a child?
who am i kidding. booo kids. but for real though. Texas why you no want me to have health insurance and fix my many mental issues?
I could move out of state and have free health care in a second flat.
